"## 4. Non-Goals\n- 不实现完整多 agent DAG 调度。\n- 不实现 UI dashboard。\n- 不实现外部 IM 平台桥接。\n- 不做复杂权限模型（如 org/team/ACL matrix）。",
"## 4. Non-Goals\n- 不实现完整多 agent DAG 调度。\n- 不实现 UI dashboard。\n- 不实现外部 IM 平台桥接。\n- 不做复杂权限模型（如 org/team/ACL matrix）。\n- 不在 MVP 中实现 token rotation / revoke API（先采用 admin 重新创建 profile 的运维替代策略，正式轮次再补）。"
)
prd = prd.replace(
"### In\n- Profile registry\n- Auth\n- Direct / group thread 数据模型\n- Message send/read/ack\n- Scratchpad\n- MCP server + tools\n- CLI（最小 admin/profile 操作）",
"### In\n- Profile registry\n- Auth\n- Direct thread MVP（数据模型预留 handoff / group 扩展位）\n- Message send/read/ack（以 per-recipient receipt 建模）\n- Scratchpad\n- MCP server + tools\n- Python 项目基础交付：`README.md`、`requirements.txt`、`pyproject.toml`\n- CLI（最小 admin/profile 操作，可选但不高于 API/MCP 优先级）"
)
prd = prd.replace(
"## 8. Functional Requirements\n1. 系统必须允许 admin 登录并创建 profile。\n2. 系统必须为新 profile 生成静态 access token，并仅在创建时返回一次。\n3. profile 必须能够创建或复用 direct thread，并发送消息。\n4. profile 必须只能访问自己参与的 thread、message、scratchpad。\n5. 收件 profile 必须能查询 inbox，并把消息标记为 read 或 ack。\n6. thread 必须支持 key-value scratchpad，并保留最后更新时间与操作者。\n7. Hermes 必须可通过 MCP tools 调用上述核心能力。",
"## 8. Functional Requirements\n1. 系统必须允许 admin 登录并创建 profile。\n2. 系统必须为新 profile 生成静态 access token，并仅在创建时返回一次。服务端不得明文回显历史 token。\n3. profile 必须能够创建或复用 direct thread，并发送消息。\n4. profile 必须只能访问自己参与的 thread、message、scratchpad。\n5. 收件 profile 必须能查询 inbox，并把消息标记为 read 或 ack。消息状态必须按 receipt（message_id + recipient_id）建模，而不是挂在 message 全局状态上。\n6. thread 必须支持 key-value scratchpad，并保留最后更新时间与操作者。\n7. Hermes 必须可通过 MCP tools 调用上述核心能力，tool handler 仅做 REST client mapping，不内嵌业务状态机。\n8. 实现固定采用 Python + FastAPI + SQLite + MCP 模式。"
)
prd = prd.replace(
"## 13. Metrics / Success Signals\n- 两个 profile 能完成完整消息往返。\n- scratchpad 可共享。\n- MCP 工具可稳定调用。\n- 测试全部通过。",
"## 13. Metrics / Success Signals\n- 两个 profile 能完成完整消息往返。\n- scratchpad 可共享。\n- MCP 工具可稳定调用。\n- 本地 `pytest` 覆盖 auth/profile 注册、message flow、scratchpad、MCP dispatch，且全部通过。"
)
updates[prd_path] = prd

# Patch capability
cap_path = '/Users/woosley/code/hiveX/docs/capability/profile-communication-mvp.md'
cap = read_file(cap_path)['content']
cap = cap.replace(
"- Admin 与 profile 使用不同认证机制：admin JWT、profile 静态 token。\n- Profile 只能访问自己参与的 thread / receipt / scratchpad。\n- Direct thread 需要幂等复用，避免同一 pair 产生大量重复 thread。\n- Scratchpad 需要结构化 JSON 值，而不是只支持字符串。\n- MCP 工具必须映射到稳定的 REST client 方法，避免在 tool handler 中写业务逻辑。",
"- Admin 与 profile 使用不同认证机制：admin JWT、profile 静态 token。\n- Profile token 在存储层以 hash 形式保存；明文 token 只在创建时回传一次。\n- Profile 只能访问自己参与的 thread / receipt / scratchpad。\n- Direct thread 需要幂等复用，避免同一 pair 产生大量重复 thread。\n- Receipt 状态按接收者建模：`unread -> read -> acked`。重复 read / ack 调用需幂等。\n- Scratchpad 需要结构化 JSON 值，而不是只支持字符串。\n- MCP 工具必须映射到稳定的 REST client 方法，避免在 tool handler 中写业务逻辑。"
)
cap = cap.replace(
"### surfaces\n- FastAPI REST API\n- Click CLI\n- MCP server (stdio)",
"### surfaces\n- FastAPI REST API\n- Click CLI（MVP 可最小化）\n- MCP server (stdio)"
)
updates[cap_path] = cap

# Patch design
design_path = '/Users/woosley/code/hiveX/docs/design/profile-communication-mvp.md'
design = read_file(design_path)['content']
design = design.replace(
"## Interface/API Contracts\n- `POST /api/auth/login` -> admin JWT\n- `GET /api/auth/me` -> 当前身份\n- `POST /api/profiles` -> admin 创建 profile，返回 access token（一次）\n- `GET /api/profiles` -> profile 目录\n- `POST /api/threads/direct` -> 创建/复用 direct thread\n- `GET /api/threads` -> 当前 profile 的 thread 列表\n- `GET /api/threads/{thread_id}` -> thread 详情\n- `GET /api/threads/{thread_id}/messages` -> thread message stream\n- `POST /api/threads/{thread_id}/messages` -> thread 发消息\n- `GET /api/messages/inbox` -> 当前 profile inbox\n- `POST /api/messages/{message_id}/read` -> 标记已读\n- `POST /api/messages/{message_id}/ack` -> 标记确认，可附带 note\n- `GET /api/threads/{thread_id}/scratchpad` -> 获取 scratchpad\n- `PUT /api/threads/{thread_id}/scratchpad/{key}` -> upsert scratchpad value",
"## Interface/API Contracts\n- `POST /api/auth/login` -> admin JWT\n- `GET /api/auth/me` -> 当前身份\n- `POST /api/profiles` -> admin 创建 profile，返回 access token（一次）\n- `GET /api/profiles` -> profile 目录\n- `POST /api/threads/direct` -> 创建/复用 direct thread（MVP 唯一建 thread 入口）\n- `GET /api/threads` -> 当前 profile 的 thread 列表\n- `GET /api/threads/{thread_id}` -> thread 详情\n- `GET /api/threads/{thread_id}/messages` -> thread message stream\n- `POST /api/threads/{thread_id}/messages` -> thread 发消息\n- `GET /api/messages/inbox` -> 当前 profile inbox\n- `POST /api/messages/{message_id}/read` -> 标记已读（幂等）\n- `POST /api/messages/{message_id}/ack` -> 标记确认（幂等，可附带 note）\n- `GET /api/threads/{thread_id}/scratchpad` -> 获取 scratchpad\n- `PUT /api/threads/{thread_id}/scratchpad/{key}` -> upsert scratchpad value\n\n## MCP/API Mapping\n- `get_inbox` -> `GET /api/messages/inbox`\n- `get_thread_messages` -> `GET /api/threads/{thread_id}/messages`\n- `send_message` -> `POST /api/threads/direct` (get/create) + `POST /api/threads/{thread_id}/messages`\n- `reply_thread` -> `POST /api/threads/{thread_id}/messages`\n- `mark_message_read` -> `POST /api/messages/{message_id}/read`\n- `ack_message` -> `POST /api/messages/{message_id}/ack`\n- `get_scratchpad` -> `GET /api/threads/{thread_id}/scratchpad`\n- `set_scratchpad_value` -> `PUT /api/threads/{thread_id}/scratchpad/{key}`"
)
design = design.replace(
"### profiles\n- `profile_id`\n- `display_name`\n- `capabilities` JSON\n- `access_token`\n- timestamps",
"### profiles\n- `profile_id`\n- `display_name`\n- `capabilities` JSON\n- `access_token_hash`\n- timestamps"
)
design = design.replace(
"### threads\n- `thread_id`\n- `thread_type`\n- `subject`\n- `created_by`\n- `metadata` JSON",
"### threads\n- `thread_id`\n- `thread_type` (`direct` in MVP; `handoff/group` reserved)\n- `subject`\n- `created_by`\n- `metadata` JSON"
)
design = design.replace(
"## Security Considerations\n- 所有非 login 接口均要求 Bearer token。\n- Admin 拥有全局权限。\n- Profile 必须校验 thread participation。\n- 不返回完整 token 给非创建场景。\n- ack/read 只能作用于当前 profile 的 receipt。",
"## Security Considerations\n- 所有非 login 接口均要求 Bearer token。\n- Admin 拥有全局权限。\n- Profile 必须校验 thread participation。\n- 服务端只保存 token hash，不保存可直接回放的明文 token。\n- 不返回完整 token 给非创建场景。\n- ack/read 只能作用于当前 profile 的 receipt。\n- 非法 read/ack、越权读取 thread/scratchpad 必须返回 403/404，而不是静默成功。"
)
design = design.replace(
"## Test Strategy\n- integration: auth/profile 注册、message flow、scratchpad\n- unit: MCP tool dispatch\n- access control: 非参与者读取 thread/message/scratchpad 应失败",
"## Test Strategy\n- integration: auth/profile 注册、message flow、scratchpad\n- unit: MCP tool dispatch\n- access control: 非参与者读取 thread/message/scratchpad 应失败\n- edge cases: direct thread 重复创建应复用；重复 read/ack 应幂等；recipient 不存在应 404/400"
)
updates[design_path] = design

for path, content in updates.items():
    write_file(path, content)

print(f'Patched {len(updates)} docs')"}

我会在接下来的实现提交里一并修正：**加 `.gitignore` + 从 Git 索引移除虚拟环境和缓存文件**，不会假装没发生过～

content.text:
我刚发现一个真实问题：刚才那个 RED checkpoint 把 `.venv/` 也一起提交进去了，这不符合干净仓库要求。  
我会在接下来的实现提交里一并修正：**加 `.gitignore` + 从 Git 索引移除虚拟环境和缓存文件**，不会假装没发生过～

{"code":"from hermes_tools import write_file

files = {
    '/Users/woosley/code/hiveX/.gitignore': '''.venv/
__pycache__/
.pytest_cache/
*.pyc
*.pyo
*.db
*.db-shm
*.db-wal
''',
    '/Users/woosley/code/hiveX/hivex/__init__.py': '''"""hiveX package."""
''',
    '/Users/woosley/code/hiveX/hivex/database.py': '''from __future__ import annotations

import os
from pathlib import Path

import aiosqlite

_db: aiosqlite.Connection | None = None
_db_path: str | None = None


def get_db_path() -> str:
    return os.environ.get(
        "HIVEX_DB_PATH",
        str(Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent / "hivex.db"),
    )


async def get_db() -> aiosqlite.Connection:
    global _db, _db_path
    db_path = get_db_path()
    if _db is not None and _db_path != db_path:
        await _db.close()
        _db = None
        _db_path = None

    if _db is None:
        _db = await aiosqlite.connect(db_path)
        _db.row_factory = aiosqlite.Row
        await _db.execute("PRAGMA journal_mode=WAL")
        await _db.execute("PRAGMA foreign_keys=ON")
        _db_path = db_path
    return _db


async def close_db() -> None:
    global _db, _db_path
    if _db is not None:
        await _db.close()
    _db = None
    _db_path = None


async def init_db() -> None:
    db = await get_db()
    await db.executescript(
        """
        CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS profiles (
            profile_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
            display_name TEXT NOT NULL,
            capabilities TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]',
            access_token_hash TEXT NOT NULL,
            created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
            updated_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
        );

        CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS threads (
            thread_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
            thread_type TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'direct',
            subject TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
            created_by TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES profiles(profile_id),
            metadata TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
            created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
            updated_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
        );

        CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS thread_participants (
            thread_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES threads(thread_id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
            profile_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES profiles(profile_id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
            created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
            PRIMARY KEY (thread_id, profile_id)
        );

        CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS messages (
            message_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
            thread_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES threads(thread_id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
            sender_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES profiles(profile_id),
            body TEXT NOT NULL,
            message_type TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'message',
            reply_to_message_id TEXT REFERENCES messages(message_id),
            metadata TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
            created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
        );

        CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS receipts (
            message_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES messages(message_id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
            profile_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES profiles(profile_id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
            status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'unread',
            read_at TEXT,
            acked_at TEXT,
            ack_note TEXT,
            PRIMARY KEY (message_id, profile_id)
        );

        CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS scratchpad_entries (
            thread_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES threads(thread_id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
            key TEXT NOT NULL,
            value TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'null',
            updated_by TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES profiles(profile_id),
            updated_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
            PRIMARY KEY (thread_id, key)
        );

        CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_thread_participants_profile ON thread_participants(profile_id);
        CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_messages_thread ON messages(thread_id, created_at);
        CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_receipts_profile_status ON receipts(profile_id, status);
        """
    )
    await db.commit()
''',
    '/Users/woosley/code/hiveX/hivex/models.py': '''from __future__ import annotations

import json
from typing import Any

from pydantic import BaseModel, Field


class AdminLoginRequest(BaseModel):
    username: str
    password: str


class TokenResponse(BaseModel):
    token: str
    token_type: str = "bearer"
    role: str


class ProfileCreate(BaseModel):
    profile_id: str = Field(..., pattern=r"^[a-z0-9_-]+$")
    display_name: str
    capabilities: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)


class ProfileOut(BaseModel):
    agent_id: str
    display_name: str
    capabilities: list[str]
    created_at: str
    updated_at: str


class ProfileRegisterOut(BaseModel):
    agent: ProfileOut
    access_token: str


class DirectThreadCreate(BaseModel):
    recipient_id: str
    subject: str = ""


class MessageCreate(BaseModel):
    body: str
    message_type: str = "message"
    reply_to_message_id: str | None = None
    metadata: dict[str, Any] = Field(default_factory=dict)


class AckRequest(BaseModel):
    note: str = ""


class ScratchpadValueRequest(BaseModel):
    value: Any


class MeResponse(BaseModel):
    id: str
    role: str
    agent_id: str | None = None


class ThreadOut(BaseModel):
    thread_id: str
    thread_type: str
    subject: str
    created_by: str
    metadata: dict[str, Any]
    created_at: str
    updated_at: str
    participants: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)


class MessageOut(BaseModel):
    message_id: str
    thread_id: str
    sender_id: str
    body: str
    message_type: str
    reply_to_message_id: str | None
    metadata: dict[str, Any]
    created_at: str


class InboxItem(BaseModel):
    message_id: str
    thread_id: str
    sender_id: str
    body: str
    message_type: str
    created_at: str
    status: str

    '/Users/woosley/code/hiveX/hivex/auth.py': '''from __future__ import annotations

import hashlib
import os
import secrets
from dataclasses import dataclass
from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone

import jwt
from fastapi import Depends, HTTPException, Security
from fastapi.security import HTTPAuthorizationCredentials, HTTPBearer

from hivex.database import get_db

security_scheme = HTTPBearer(auto_error=True)
JWT_ALGORITHM = "HS256"


def admin_username() -> str:
    return os.environ.get("HIVEX_ADMIN_USERNAME", "admin")


def admin_password() -> str:
    return os.environ.get("HIVEX_ADMIN_PASSWORD", "hivex2026")


def jwt_secret() -> str:
    return os.environ.get("HIVEX_JWT_SECRET", "hivex-dev-secret")


def hash_token(token: str) -> str:
    return hashlib.sha256(token.encode("utf-8")).hexdigest()


def generate_profile_token() -> str:
    return secrets.token_hex(32)


def generate_admin_jwt() -> str:
    now = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
    payload = {
        "sub": admin_username(),
        "role": "admin",
        "iat": now,
        "exp": now + timedelta(hours=24),
    }
    return jwt.encode(payload, jwt_secret(), algorithm=JWT_ALGORITHM)


@dataclass
class Identity:
    id: str
    role: str
    profile_id: str | None = None

    @property
    def is_admin(self) -> bool:
        return self.role == "admin"

    @property
    def is_profile(self) -> bool:
        return self.role == "profile"


def validate_admin_credentials(username: str, password: str) -> bool:
    return username == admin_username() and password == admin_password()


def _decode_admin_jwt(token: str) -> Identity | None:
    try:
        payload = jwt.decode(token, jwt_secret(), algorithms=[JWT_ALGORITHM])
    except jwt.PyJWTError:
        return None
    if payload.get("role") != "admin":
        return None
    return Identity(id=payload["sub"], role="admin")


async def _resolve_profile_by_token(token: str) -> Identity | None:
    db = await get_db()
    cursor = await db.execute(
        "SELECT profile_id FROM profiles WHERE access_token_hash = ?",
        (hash_token(token),),
    )
    row = await cursor.fetchone()
    if row is None:
        return None
    return Identity(id=row["profile_id"], role="profile", profile_id=row["profile_id"])


async def resolve_identity(
    credentials: HTTPAuthorizationCredentials = Security(security_scheme),
) -> Identity:
    token = credentials.credentials
    admin = _decode_admin_jwt(token)
    if admin is not None:
        return admin
    profile = await _resolve_profile_by_token(token)
    if profile is not None:
        return profile
    raise HTTPException(status_code=401, detail="Invalid or expired token")


async def require_admin(identity: Identity = Depends(resolve_identity)) -> Identity:
    if not identity.is_admin:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=403, detail="Admin access required")
    return identity

    '/Users/woosley/code/hiveX/hivex/api.py': '''from __future__ import annotations

import json
import secrets
from typing import Any

from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, HTTPException

from hivex.auth import Identity, generate_admin_jwt, generate_profile_token, hash_token, require_admin, resolve_identity, validate_admin_credentials
from hivex.database import get_db
from hivex.models import AckRequest, AdminLoginRequest, DirectThreadCreate, InboxItem, MeResponse, MessageCreate, MessageOut, ProfileCreate, ProfileOut, ProfileRegisterOut, ReceiptOut, ScratchpadEntryOut, ScratchpadValueRequest, ThreadOut, TokenResponse, loads_json

router = APIRouter()


def _profile_out(row: Any) -> dict[str, Any]:
    return {
        "agent_id": row["profile_id"],
        "display_name": row["display_name"],
        "capabilities": loads_json(row["capabilities"]),
        "created_at": row["created_at"],
        "updated_at": row["updated_at"],
    }


async def _ensure_profile_exists(profile_id: str) -> None:
    db = await get_db()
    cursor = await db.execute("SELECT profile_id FROM profiles WHERE profile_id = ?", (profile_id,))
    if await cursor.fetchone() is None:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Profile not found")


async def _ensure_thread_participant(thread_id: str, profile_id: str) -> None:
    db = await get_db()
    cursor = await db.execute(
        "SELECT 1 FROM thread_participants WHERE thread_id = ? AND profile_id = ?",
        (thread_id, profile_id),
    )
    if await cursor.fetchone() is None:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=403, detail="Access denied")


async def _get_thread(thread_id: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
    db = await get_db()
    cursor = await db.execute("SELECT * FROM threads WHERE thread_id = ?", (thread_id,))
    row = await cursor.fetchone()
    if row is None:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Thread not found")
    pcur = await db.execute(
        "SELECT profile_id FROM thread_participants WHERE thread_id = ? ORDER BY profile_id",
        (thread_id,),
    )
    participants = [r["profile_id"] for r in await pcur.fetchall()]
    return {
        "thread_id": row["thread_id"],
        "thread_type": row["thread_type"],
        "subject": row["subject"],
        "created_by": row["created_by"],
        "metadata": loads_json(row["metadata"]),
        "created_at": row["created_at"],
        "updated_at": row["updated_at"],
        "participants": participants,
    }


async def _find_direct_thread(profile_a: str, profile_b: str) -> str | None:
    db = await get_db()
    cursor = await db.execute(
        """
        SELECT t.thread_id
        FROM threads t
        JOIN thread_participants p1 ON p1.thread_id = t.thread_id AND p1.profile_id = ?
        JOIN thread_participants p2 ON p2.thread_id = t.thread_id AND p2.profile_id = ?
        WHERE t.thread_type = 'direct'
          AND (
            SELECT COUNT(*) FROM thread_participants tp WHERE tp.thread_id = t.thread_id
          ) = 2
        LIMIT 1
        """,
        (profile_a, profile_b),
    )
    row = await cursor.fetchone()
    return row["thread_id"] if row else None


async def _create_direct_thread(sender_id: str, recipient_id: str, subject: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
    if sender_id == recipient_id:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail="Cannot create direct thread with yourself")
    await _ensure_profile_exists(recipient_id)
    existing = await _find_direct_thread(sender_id, recipient_id)
    if existing:
        return await _get_thread(existing)

    db = await get_db()
    thread_id = f"thr_{secrets.token_hex(8)}"
    metadata = json.dumps({"kind": "direct"}, ensure_ascii=False)
    await db.execute(
        "INSERT INTO threads(thread_id, thread_type, subject, created_by, metadata) VALUES (?, 'direct', ?, ?, ?)",
        (thread_id, subject, sender_id, metadata),
    )
    await db.executemany(
        "INSERT INTO thread_participants(thread_id, profile_id) VALUES (?, ?)",
        [(thread_id, sender_id), (thread_id, recipient_id)],
    )
    await db.commit()
    return await _get_thread(thread_id)


async def _create_message(thread_id: str, sender_id: str, payload: MessageCreate) -> dict[str, Any]:
    db = await get_db()
    await _ensure_thread_participant(thread_id, sender_id)
    thread = await _get_thread(thread_id)
    message_id = f"msg_{secrets.token_hex(8)}"
    await db.execute(
        """
        INSERT INTO messages(message_id, thread_id, sender_id, body, message_type, reply_to_message_id, metadata)
        VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
        """,
        (
            message_id,
            thread_id,
            sender_id,
            payload.body,
            payload.message_type,
            payload.reply_to_message_id,
            json.dumps(payload.metadata, ensure_ascii=False),
        ),
    )
    receipts = [
        (message_id, participant)
        for participant in thread["participants"]
        if participant != sender_id
    ]
    if receipts:
        await db.executemany(
            "INSERT INTO receipts(message_id, profile_id, status) VALUES (?, ?, 'unread')",
            receipts,
        )
    await db.execute(
        "UPDATE threads SET updated_at = datetime('now') WHERE thread_id = ?",
        (thread_id,),
    )
    await db.commit()
    return {
        "message_id": message_id,
        "thread_id": thread_id,
        "sender_id": sender_id,
        "body": payload.body,
        "message_type": payload.message_type,
        "reply_to_message_id": payload.reply_to_message_id,
        "metadata": payload.metadata,
    }


@router.post('/api/auth/login', response_model=TokenResponse)
async def login(payload: AdminLoginRequest) -> TokenResponse:
    if not validate_admin_credentials(payload.username, payload.password):
        raise HTTPException(status_code=401, detail='Invalid credentials')
    return TokenResponse(token=generate_admin_jwt(), role='admin')


@router.get('/api/auth/me', response_model=MeResponse)
async def me(identity: Identity = Depends(resolve_identity)) -> MeResponse:
    return MeResponse(id=identity.id, role=identity.role, agent_id=identity.profile_id)


@router.post('/api/profiles', response_model=ProfileRegisterOut, status_code=201)
async def create_profile(payload: ProfileCreate, _: Identity = Depends(require_admin)) -> ProfileRegisterOut:
    db = await get_db()
    access_token = generate_profile_token()
    try:
        await db.execute(
            "INSERT INTO profiles(profile_id, display_name, capabilities, access_token_hash) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)",
            (
                payload.profile_id,
                payload.display_name,
                json.dumps(payload.capabilities, ensure_ascii=False),
                hash_token(access_token),
            ),
        )
        await db.commit()
    except Exception as exc:
        if 'UNIQUE constraint failed' in str(exc):
            raise HTTPException(status_code=409, detail='Profile already exists') from exc
        raise

    cursor = await db.execute(
        "SELECT * FROM profiles WHERE profile_id = ?",
        (payload.profile_id,),
    )
    row = await cursor.fetchone()
    return ProfileRegisterOut(agent=ProfileOut(**_profile_out(row)), access_token=access_token)


@router.get('/api/profiles', response_model=list[ProfileOut])
async def list_profiles(identity: Identity = Depends(resolve_identity)) -> list[ProfileOut]:
    _ = identity
    db = await get_db()
    cursor = await db.execute("SELECT * FROM profiles ORDER BY profile_id")
    return [ProfileOut(**_profile_out(row)) for row in await cursor.fetchall()]


@router.post('/api/threads/direct', response_model=ThreadOut, status_code=201)
async def create_direct_thread(payload: DirectThreadCreate, identity: Identity = Depends(resolve_identity)) -> ThreadOut:
    if not identity.is_profile:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=403, detail='Profile identity required')
    thread = await _create_direct_thread(identity.profile_id, payload.recipient_id, payload.subject)
    return ThreadOut(**thread)


@router.get('/api/threads', response_model=list[ThreadOut])
async def list_threads(identity: Identity = Depends(resolve_identity)) -> list[ThreadOut]:
    if not identity.is_profile:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=403, detail='Profile identity required')
    db = await get_db()
    cursor = await db.execute(
        """
        SELECT t.thread_id
        FROM threads t
        JOIN thread_participants tp ON tp.thread_id = t.thread_id
        WHERE tp.profile_id = ?
        ORDER BY t.updated_at DESC
        """,
        (identity.profile_id,),
    )
    thread_ids = [row["thread_id"] for row in await cursor.fetchall()]
    return [ThreadOut(**(await _get_thread(thread_id))) for thread_id in thread_ids]


@router.get('/api/threads/{thread_id}', response_model=ThreadOut)
async def get_thread(thread_id: str, identity: Identity = Depends(resolve_identity)) -> ThreadOut:
    if not identity.is_profile:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=403, detail='Profile identity required')
    await _ensure_thread_participant(thread_id, identity.profile_id)
    return ThreadOut(**(await _get_thread(thread_id)))


@router.get('/api/threads/{thread_id}/messages', response_model=list[MessageOut])
async def get_thread_messages(thread_id: str, limit: int = 50, identity: Identity = Depends(resolve_identity)) -> list[MessageOut]:
    if not identity.is_profile:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=403, detail='Profile identity required')
    await _ensure_thread_participant(thread_id, identity.profile_id)
    db = await get_db()
    cursor = await db.execute(
        "SELECT * FROM messages WHERE thread_id = ? ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT ?",
        (thread_id, limit),
    )
    rows = await cursor.fetchall()
    return [
        MessageOut(
            message_id=row['message_id'],
            thread_id=row['thread_id'],
            sender_id=row['sender_id'],
            body=row['body'],
            message_type=row['message_type'],
            reply_to_message_id=row['reply_to_message_id'],
            metadata=loads_json(row['metadata']),
            created_at=row['created_at'],
        )
        for row in rows
    ]


@router.post('/api/threads/{thread_id}/messages', status_code=201)
async def post_message(thread_id: str, payload: MessageCreate, identity: Identity = Depends(resolve_identity)) -> dict[str, Any]:
    if not identity.is_profile:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=403, detail='Profile identity required')
    return await _create_message(thread_id, identity.profile_id, payload)


@router.get('/api/messages/inbox', response_model=list[InboxItem])
async def get_inbox(status: str = 'unread', limit: int = 20, identity: Identity = Depends(resolve_identity)) -> list[InboxItem]:
    if not identity.is_profile:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=403, detail='Profile identity required')
    db = await get_db()
    params: list[Any] = [identity.profile_id]
    sql = """
        SELECT r.message_id, m.thread_id, m.sender_id, m.body, m.message_type, m.created_at,
               r.status, r.read_at, r.acked_at, r.ack_note
        FROM receipts r
        JOIN messages m ON m.message_id = r.message_id
        WHERE r.profile_id = ?
    """
    if status != 'all':
        sql += " AND r.status = ?"
        params.append(status)
    sql += " ORDER BY m.created_at DESC LIMIT ?"
    params.append(limit)
    cursor = await db.execute(sql, params)
    rows = await cursor.fetchall()
    return [InboxItem(**dict(row)) for row in rows]


async def _get_receipt_for_profile(message_id: str, profile_id: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
    db = await get_db()
    cursor = await db.execute(
        "SELECT * FROM receipts WHERE message_id = ? AND profile_id = ?",
        (message_id, profile_id),
    )
    row = await cursor.fetchone()
    if row is None:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail='Receipt not found')
    return dict(row)


@router.post('/api/messages/{message_id}/read', response_model=ReceiptOut)
async def mark_message_read(message_id: str, identity: Identity = Depends(resolve_identity)) -> ReceiptOut:
    if not identity.is_profile:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=403, detail='Profile identity required')
    receipt = await _get_receipt_for_profile(message_id, identity.profile_id)
    db = await get_db()
    if receipt['status'] == 'unread':
        await db.execute(
            "UPDATE receipts SET status = 'read', read_at = COALESCE(read_at, datetime('now')) WHERE message_id = ? AND profile_id = ?",
            (message_id, identity.profile_id),
        )
        await db.commit()
    updated = await _get_receipt_for_profile(message_id, identity.profile_id)
    return ReceiptOut(**updated)


@router.post('/api/messages/{message_id}/ack', response_model=ReceiptOut)
async def ack_message(message_id: str, payload: AckRequest, identity: Identity = Depends(resolve_identity)) -> ReceiptOut:
    if not identity.is_profile:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=403, detail='Profile identity required')
    await _get_receipt_for_profile(message_id, identity.profile_id)
    db = await get_db()
    await db.execute(
        """
        UPDATE receipts
        SET status = 'acked',
            read_at = COALESCE(read_at, datetime('now')),
            acked_at = COALESCE(acked_at, datetime('now')),
            ack_note = CASE WHEN ? != '' THEN ? ELSE ack_note END
        WHERE message_id = ? AND profile_id = ?
        """,
        (payload.note, payload.note, message_id, identity.profile_id),
    )
    await db.commit()
    updated = await _get_receipt_for_profile(message_id, identity.profile_id)
    return ReceiptOut(**updated)


@router.get('/api/threads/{thread_id}/scratchpad')
async def get_scratchpad(thread_id: str, identity: Identity = Depends(resolve_identity)) -> dict[str, Any]:
    if not identity.is_profile:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=403, detail='Profile identity required')
    await _ensure_thread_participant(thread_id, identity.profile_id)
    db = await get_db()
    cursor = await db.execute(
        "SELECT key, value, updated_by, updated_at FROM scratchpad_entries WHERE thread_id = ? ORDER BY key",
        (thread_id,),
    )
    rows = await cursor.fetchall()
    return {
        row['key']: ScratchpadEntryOut(
            key=row['key'],
            value=loads_json(row['value']),
            updated_by=row['updated_by'],
            updated_at=row['updated_at'],
        ).model_dump()
        for row in rows
    }


@router.put('/api/threads/{thread_id}/scratchpad/{key}')
async def set_scratchpad_value(thread_id: str, key: str, payload: ScratchpadValueRequest, identity: Identity = Depends(resolve_identity)) -> dict[str, Any]:
    if not identity.is_profile:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=403, detail='Profile identity required')
    await _ensure_thread_participant(thread_id, identity.profile_id)
    db = await get_db()
    await db.execute(
        """
        INSERT INTO scratchpad_entries(thread_id, key, value, updated_by, updated_at)
        VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, datetime('now'))
        ON CONFLICT(thread_id, key) DO UPDATE SET
            value = excluded.value,
            updated_by = excluded.updated_by,
            updated_at = datetime('now')
        """,
        (thread_id, key, json.dumps(payload.value, ensure_ascii=False), identity.profile_id),
    )
    await db.commit()
    return {
        'key': key,
        'value': payload.value,
        'updated_by': identity.profile_id,
    }

from fastapi import FastAPI

from hivex.api import router

@asynccontextmanager

    yield
    await close_db()

    '/Users/woosley/code/hiveX/hivex/hivex_client.py': '''from __future__ import annotations

import os

import httpx


class AuthenticationError(Exception):
    pass


class HiveXClient:
    def __init__(self, base_url: str | None = None, profile_id: str | None = None, token: str | None = None):
        self.base_url = base_url or os.environ.get('HIVEX_URL', 'http://localhost:8858')
        self.profile_id = profile_id or os.environ.get('HIVEX_PROFILE_ID', '')
        self.token = token if token is not None else os.environ.get('HIVEX_ACCESS_TOKEN', '')
        headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {self.token}'} if self.token else {}
        self._client = httpx.AsyncClient(base_url=self.base_url, timeout=10.0, headers=headers)

    async def close(self) -> None:
        await self._client.aclose()

    async def _get(self, path: str, params: dict | None = None) -> httpx.Response:
        response = await self._client.get(path, params=params)
        if response.status_code == 401:
            raise AuthenticationError(response.text)
        return response

    async def _post(self, path: str, json: dict | None = None) -> httpx.Response:
        response = await self._client.post(path, json=json)
        if response.status_code == 401:
            raise AuthenticationError(response.text)
        return response

    async def _put(self, path: str, json: dict | None = None) -> httpx.Response:
        response = await self._client.put(path, json=json)
        if response.status_code == 401:
            raise AuthenticationError(response.text)
        return response

    async def get_inbox(self, status: str = 'unread', limit: int = 20):
        response = await self._get('/api/messages/inbox', {'status': status, 'limit': limit})
        return response.json()

    async def get_thread_messages(self, thread_id: str, limit: int = 50):
        response = await self._get(f'/api/threads/{thread_id}/messages', {'limit': limit})
        return response.json()

    async def send_message(self, recipient_id: str, body: str, subject: str = '', message_type: str = 'message', metadata=None):
        thread_response = await self._post('/api/threads/direct', {'recipient_id': recipient_id, 'subject': subject})
        thread_id = thread_response.json()['thread_id']
        message_response = await self._post(
            f'/api/threads/{thread_id}/messages',
            {
                'body': body,
                'message_type': message_type,
                'metadata': metadata or {},
            },
        )
        return message_response.json()

    async def reply_thread(self, thread_id: str, body: str, message_type: str = 'message', reply_to_message_id: str | None = None, metadata=None):
        response = await self._post(
            f'/api/threads/{thread_id}/messages',
            {
                'body': body,
                'message_type': message_type,
                'reply_to_message_id': reply_to_message_id,
                'metadata': metadata or {},
            },
        )
        return response.json()

    async def mark_message_read(self, message_id: str):
        response = await self._post(f'/api/messages/{message_id}/read')
        return response.json()

    async def ack_message(self, message_id: str, note: str = ''):
        response = await self._post(f'/api/messages/{message_id}/ack', {'note': note})
        return response.json()

    async def get_scratchpad(self, thread_id: str):
        response = await self._get(f'/api/threads/{thread_id}/scratchpad')
        return response.json()

    async def set_scratchpad_value(self, thread_id: str, key: str, value):
        response = await self._put(f'/api/threads/{thread_id}/scratchpad/{key}', {'value': value})
        return response.json()

    {

        'inputSchema': {

                'message_id': {'type': 'string'},
                'note': {'type': 'string', 'default': ''},
            },

        'inputSchema': {

            'required': ['thread_id'],
        },
    },
    {
        'name': 'set_scratchpad_value',

        'inputSchema': {

                'key': {'type': 'string'},
                'value': {},
            },
            'required': ['thread_id', 'key', 'value'],
        },
    },
]


async def dispatch_tool(client, name: str, arguments: dict | None):
    args = arguments or {}
    if name == 'get_inbox':
        return await client.get_inbox(status=args.get('status', 'unread'), limit=args.get('limit', 20))
    if name == 'get_thread_messages':
        return await client.get_thread_messages(args['thread_id'], limit=args.get('limit', 50))
    if name == 'send_message':
        return await client.send_message(
            recipient_id=args['recipient_id'],
            body=args['body'],
            subject=args.get('subject', ''),
            message_type=args.get('message_type', 'message'),
            metadata=args.get('metadata'),
        )
    if name == 'reply_thread':
        return await client.reply_thread(
            thread_id=args['thread_id'],
            body=args['body'],
            message_type=args.get('message_type', 'message'),
            reply_to_message_id=args.get('reply_to_message_id'),
            metadata=args.get('metadata'),
        )
    if name == 'mark_message_read':
        return await client.mark_message_read(args['message_id'])
    if name == 'ack_message':
        return await client.ack_message(args['message_id'], note=args.get('note', ''))
    if name == 'get_scratchpad':
        return await client.get_scratchpad(args['thread_id'])
    if name == 'set_scratchpad_value':
        return await client.set_scratchpad_value(args['thread_id'], args['key'], args['value'])
    raise ValueError(f'Unknown tool: {name}')

import asyncio
import json
import logging
import sys

from mcp.server import Server
from mcp.server.stdio import stdio_server
from mcp.types import TextContent, Tool

from hivex.hivex_client import HiveXClient
from hivex.mcp_tools import TOOL_DEFINITIONS, dispatch_tool

logging.basicConfig(level=logging.INFO, format='%(asctime)s [hivex.mcp] %(levelname)s: %(message)s', stream=sys.stderr)
logger = logging.getLogger('hivex.mcp')
server = Server('hivex')
_client: HiveXClient | None = None


def get_client() -> HiveXClient:
    global _client
    if _client is None:
        _client = HiveXClient()
    return _client


@server.list_tools()
async def list_tools() -> list[Tool]:
    return [Tool(name=t['name'], description=t['description'], inputSchema=t['inputSchema']) for t in TOOL_DEFINITIONS]


@server.call_tool()
async def call_tool(name: str, arguments: dict | None) -> list[TextContent]:
    try:
        result = await dispatch_tool(get_client(), name, arguments or {})
        text = json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
    except Exception as exc:
        logger.error('tool error: %s', exc)
        text = json.dumps({'error': str(exc)}, ensure_ascii=False)
    return [TextContent(type='text', text=text)]


async def main() -> None:
    async with stdio_server() as (read_stream, write_stream):
        await server.run(read_stream, write_stream, server.create_initialization_options())


if __name__ == '__main__':
    asyncio.run(main())
''',
    '/Users/woosley/code/hiveX/hivex/cli.py': '''from __future__ import annotations

import json
import os
from pathlib import Path

import click
import httpx

HIVEX_URL = os.environ.get('HIVEX_URL', 'http://localhost:8858')
AUTH_FILE = Path.home() / '.hivex' / 'auth.json'


def _save_auth(token: str, role: str) -> None:
    AUTH_FILE.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    AUTH_FILE.write_text(json.dumps({'token': token, 'role': role}, indent=2))
    os.chmod(AUTH_FILE, 0o600)


def _load_token() -> str | None:
    if AUTH_FILE.exists():
        return json.loads(AUTH_FILE.read_text()).get('token')
    return os.environ.get('HIVEX_ADMIN_TOKEN') or os.environ.get('HIVEX_ACCESS_TOKEN')


def _client() -> httpx.Client:
    token = _load_token()
    headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {token}'} if token else {}
    return httpx.Client(base_url=HIVEX_URL, timeout=10.0, headers=headers)


@click.group()
def cli():
    """hiveX CLI"""


@cli.command()
@click.option('--username', '-u', prompt=True)
@click.option('--password', '-p', prompt=True, hide_input=True)
def login(username: str, password: str):
    with httpx.Client(base_url=HIVEX_URL, timeout=10.0) as client:
        response = client.post('/api/auth/login', json={'username': username, 'password': password})
        response.raise_for_status()
        data = response.json()
        _save_auth(data['token'], data['role'])
        click.echo('✅ login success')


@cli.command('whoami')
def whoami_cmd():
    with _client() as client:
        response = client.get('/api/auth/me')
        response.raise_for_status()
        click.echo(json.dumps(response.json(), ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
''',

KEY_FINDINGS:
- 认证、profile 注册、direct message、receipt、scratchpad 的主路径实现清晰，现有 4 个 pytest 用例覆盖了 MVP 的主要 happy path。
- `HiveXClient` / `mcp_tools` 分层基本合理，但错误处理较弱：除 401 外，其它 4xx/5xx 会被当作普通 JSON 返回，MCP 调用方难以可靠区分成功与失败。
- `GET /api/messages/inbox` 与 `GET /api/threads/{thread_id}/messages` 的 `limit` 未做下界校验，负数在 SQLite 下可能退化为“无限制”，存在性能和数据暴露风险。

- 文档/契约多处声明支持 `group` / `handoff` 能力（README、PRD、capability contract），但实际 API 只有 `/api/threads/direct`，没有 group/handoff 创建路径和对应测试；当前实现与文档承诺不一致。", "api_calls": 10, "duration_seconds": 201.45, "model": SUMMARY: 我审查了 `/Users/woosley/code/hiveX/hivex` 及相关文档/测试，重点看了认证、token 处理、访问控制、敏感信息暴露与默认安全配置。实现里线程参与者校验和 receipt 归属校验总体是到位的，但当前仍存在高风险默认配置与长期凭证问题，未达到可安全上线的标准。
KEY_FINDINGS:
- 访问控制主线基本正确：`thread/message/scratchpad` 都要求 Bearer token，且 profile 访问 thread 前会校验参与者身份，`read/ack` 也限制到当前 profile 的 receipt。
- profile access token 在数据库中仅保存 `sha256` 哈希值，避免了明文落库；`POST /api/profiles` 只在创建时返回一次 token，这一点是合理的。
- `GET /api/profiles` 对任意已认证身份开放，会向所有 profile 暴露完整 profile 列表与 `capabilities`；如果这些能力标签具有内部调度/权限语义，这属于不必要的信息暴露。
- CLI 把 token 持久化到 `~/.hivex/auth.json`，并设置 `0600` 权限，做了基础保护；但客户端与 CLI 默认都走 `http://localhost:8858`，没有任何 TLS/安全传输要求，脱离本机场景时容易泄露 Bearer token。
BLOCKING_FINDINGS:
- `hivex/auth.py` 存在硬编码弱默认值：`HIVEX_ADMIN_PASSWORD` 默认是 `hivex2026`，`HIVEX_JWT_SECRET` 默认是 `hivex-dev-secret`。这意味着环境变量未正确配置时，攻击者可直接猜中管理员口令，或伪造 admin JWT，属于阻断级问题。
- profile token 是静态长期凭证：`generate_profile_token()` 生成后仅做哈希匹配，`resolve_identity()` 中没有过期时间、轮换或吊销机制。任一 profile token 泄露后可无限期访问对应身份的所有消息、thread 与 scratchpad，风险过高。", "api_calls": 6, "duration_seconds": 78.19, "model": "gpt-5.4", "exit_reason": "completed", "tokens": {"input": 212523, "output": 2810}, "tool_trace": [{"tool": "search_files", "args_bytes": 85, "result_bytes": 1158, "status": "ok"}, {"tool": "search_files", "args_bytes": 320, "result_bytes": 16915, "status": "ok"}, {"tool": "search_files", "args_bytes": 82, "result_bytes": 391, "status": "ok"}, {"tool": "read_file", "args_bytes": 50, "result_bytes": 3893, "status": "ok"}, {"tool": "read_file", "args_bytes": 49, "result_bytes": 18917, "status": "ok"}, {"tool": "read_file", "args_bytes": 52, "result_bytes": 3355, "status": "ok"}, {"tool": "read_file", "args_bytes": 54, "result_bytes": 4863, "status": "ok"}, {"tool": "read_file", "args_bytes": 49, "result_bytes": 2181, "status": "ok"}, {"tool": "read_file", "args_bytes": 58, "result_bytes": 4544, "status": "ok"}, {"tool": "read_file", "args_bytes": 46, "result_bytes": 2780, "status": "ok"}, {"tool": "read_file", "args_bytes": 80, "result_bytes": 2190, "status": "ok"}, {"tool": "read_file", "args_bytes": 77, "result_bytes": 4424, "status": "ok"}, {"tool": "search_files", "args_bytes": 272, "result_bytes": 320, "status": "ok"}, {"tool": "read_file", "args_bytes": 50, "result_bytes": 774, "status": "ok"}, {"tool": "search_files", "args_bytes": 235, "result_bytes": 16299, "status": "ok"}, {"tool": "search_files", "args_bytes": 213, "result_bytes": 18838, "status": "ok"}, {"tool": "read_file", "args_bytes": 68, "result_bytes": 1617, "status": "ok"}, {"tool": "read_file", "args_bytes": 63, "result_bytes": 3135, "status": "ok"}, {"tool": "read_file", "args_bytes": 61, "result_bytes": 2256, "status": "ok"}, {"tool": "read_file", "args_bytes": 54, "result_bytes": 1292, "status": "ok"}]}], "total_duration_seconds": 202.63}

    39|def generate_admin_jwt() -> str:
    40|    now = datetime.now(timezone.utc)

    44|        "iat": now,

    62|        return self.role == "profile"
    63|

    66|    return username == admin_username() and password == admin_password()
    67|
    68|
    69|def _decode_admin_jwt(token: str) -> Identity | None:
    70|    try:

    72|    except jwt.PyJWTError:

    85|    row = await cursor.fetchone()
    86|    if row is None:

    89|
    90|

    99|    if profile is not None:

   273|    if not identity.is_profile:
   274|        raise HTTPException(status_code=403, detail='Profile identity required')
   275|    db = await get_db()
   276|    params: list[Any] = [identity.profile_id]
   277|    sql = """
   278|        SELECT r.message_id, m.thread_id, m.sender_id, m.body, m.message_type, m.created_at,
   279|               r.status, r.read_at, r.acked_at, r.ack_note
   280|        FROM receipts r
   281|        JOIN messages m ON m.message_id = r.message_id
   282|        WHERE r.profile_id = ?
   283|    """
   284|    if status != 'all':
   285|        sql += " AND r.status = ?"
   286|        params.append(status)
   287|    sql += " ORDER BY m.created_at DESC LIMIT ?"
   288|    params.append(limit)
   289|    cursor = await db.execute(sql, params)
   290|    rows = await cursor.fetchall()

{"content": "     1|# hiveX ✉️
     2|
     3|Hermes profile 间通信层 —— 为 issue #344 的多 agent 协作提供基础通信能力。
     4|
     5|## 它是什么
     6|
     7|`hiveX` 不是另一个任务板，而是一个 **profile-to-profile communication fabric**：
     8|
     9|- Hermes 不同 profile 注册为可寻址身份
    10|- profile 之间可以发送 **direct message / handoff message / thread reply**
    11|- thread 内支持 **shared scratchpad**（L2 共享上下文）
    12|- MCP Server 把这些能力暴露给 Hermes，让 agent 可以原生调用
    13|
    14|它直接对齐 Hermes issue #344 里对多 agent 的几个关键层次：
    15|
    16|- **L1 Result Passing** → thread + handoff message
    17|- **L2 Shared Scratchpad** → thread scratchpad key-value store
    18|- **L3 Live Dialogue** → thread message stream（MVP 先做异步 mailbox 版本）
    19|
    20|## 为什么不是直接复用 Hive
    21|
    22|Hive 解决的是 **任务编排 / 指派 / poller 唤醒**。
    23|
    24|hiveX 解决的是 **profile 间通信与共享上下文**。
    25|
    26|两者关系：
    27|
    28|- Hive 更像 task control plane
    29|- hiveX 更像 communication plane
    30|
    31|未来两者可以组合：
    32|
    33|- Hive 负责任务生命周期
    34|- hiveX 负责多 profile 协作消息、handoff、共享 scratchpad
    35|
    36|## MVP 范围
    37|
    38|- Profile registry（admin 注册 profile，发放静态 access token）
    39|- Direct thread / group thread
    40|- Send / read / ack message
    41|- Inbox 查询
    42|- Thread scratchpad 读写
    43|- MCP tools for Hermes profiles
    44|- FastAPI + SQLite + Click CLI
    45|
    46|## Quick Start
    47|
    48|```bash
    49|cd ~/code/hiveX
    50|python3 -m venv .venv
    51|source .venv/bin/activate
    52|pip install -r requirements.txt
    53|uvicorn hivex.main:app --reload --port 8858
    54|```
    55|
    56|## API 概览
    57|
    58|- `POST /api/auth/login`
    59|- `GET /api/auth/me`
    60|- `POST /api/profiles`
    61|- `GET /api/profiles`
    62|- `POST /api/threads/direct`
    63|- `GET /api/threads`
    64|- `GET /api/threads/{thread_id}`
    65|- `GET /api/threads/{thread_id}/messages`
    66|- `POST /api/threads/{thread_id}/messages`
    67|- `GET /api/messages/inbox`
    68|- `POST /api/messages/{message_id}/read`
    69|- `POST /api/messages/{message_id}/ack`
    70|- `GET /api/threads/{thread_id}/scratchpad`
    71|- `PUT /api/threads/{thread_id}/scratchpad/{key}`
    72|
    73|## MCP Tools
    74|
    75|- `get_inbox`
    76|- `get_thread_messages`
    77|- `send_message`
    78|- `reply_thread`
    79|- `mark_message_read`
    80|- `ack_message`
    81|- `get_scratchpad`
    82|- `set_scratchpad_value`
    83|
    84|## 当前定位
    85|
    86|这是一个 **MVP foundation project**，目标是把 Hermes #344 的“真正多 agent 通信层”先落成可用原型，而不是一次性实现完整 DAG orchestration / coordinator / watchdog 全家桶。
    87|", "total_lines": 86, "file_size": 2459, "truncated": false, "is_binary": false, "is_image": false}

{"content": "     1|# hiveX Requirement Contract
     2|
     3|- status: PASS
     4|- ready_for_prd: true
     5|- priority: must
     6|- requirement_contract_path: docs/contracts/profile-communication-mvp.md
     7|
     8|## objective
     9|构建一个新的 Python 项目 `hiveX`，放在 `~/code/hiveX`，作为 Hermes 不同 profile 之间的通信层，让多个 profile 可以安全地互相发送消息、做 handoff，并在共享 thread 内维护 scratchpad，上层可用于承接 Hermes issue #344 的多 agent 协作能力。
    10|
    11|## constraints
    12|- 使用 Python 实现。
    13|- 项目目录固定为 `~/code/hiveX`。
    14|- 参考现有 `~/code/hive` 的 FastAPI + SQLite + MCP 模式，但不要把 hiveX 做成另一个 task board。
    15|- 要结合 Hermes issue #344 的研究结论，至少覆盖 result passing / shared scratchpad 这两个层次。
    16|- 需要提供可供 Hermes profile 使用的 MCP 接口。
    17|- 需要有可执行测试。
    18|- 遵守 feature branch 开发，不在 main 直接开发。
    19|
    20|## acceptance_criteria
    21|1. `~/code/hiveX` 存在一个可运行的 Python 项目，包含 `README.md`、`requirements.txt`、`pyproject.toml`。
    22|2. FastAPI 应用可暴露 profile registry、thread/message、scratchpad、auth 相关 API。
    23|3. 支持 admin 登录并创建 profile，profile 使用静态 access token 访问 API。
    24|4. 支持两个 profile 之间创建 direct thread，并发送消息。
    25|5. 接收方可查询 inbox，并把消息标记为 read / ack。
    26|6. thread 支持 scratchpad 的读写，且参与方都能读取。
    27|7. 提供 MCP server 与工具定义，至少覆盖 inbox、send/reply、read/ack、scratchpad 读写。
    28|8. pytest 至少包含：auth/profile 注册、message flow、scratchpad、MCP tool dispatch 的测试。
    29|9. 测试在本地执行并明确汇报结果。
    30|
    31|## non_goals
    32|- 本次不实现完整 DAG workflow engine。
    33|- 本次不实现多进程 watchdog / health daemon。
    34|- 本次不实现跨平台 gateway 投递。
    35|- 本次不做 Web UI。
    36|- 本次不替代 Hive 的任务调度与 poller。
    37|
    38|## risks_assumptions
    39|- 假设 MVP 允许使用 SQLite 作为单机原型存储。
    40|- 假设 Hermes profile 的注册由 admin 完成，而不是开放匿名自注册。
    41|- 风险：如果把范围扩展到完整 multi-agent orchestrator，会显著放大复杂度与测试成本。
    42|- 风险：MCP/tool 调用的真实 Hermes 集成未在本轮做端到端实机验证，只做 server/tool 级验证。
    43|
    44|## ambiguities
    45|- 不阻塞：thread 是否需要群组模式。MVP 先支持 group thread 数据模型，但重点验证 direct thread。
    46|- 不阻塞：ack 时是否强制附带 note。MVP 设为可选。
    47|
    48|## missing_fields
    49|- none
    50|", "total_lines": 49, "file_size": 2599, "truncated": false, "is_binary": false, "is_image": false}

{"content": "     1|     1|# hiveX Profile Communication MVP PRD
     2|     2|
     3|     3|## 1. Background
     4|     4|Hermes 现在已有 `delegate_task`，但 issue #344 明确指出：现在更像“父 agent 派一次性子任务”，不是真正的 multi-agent。缺的是 profile 间可持续通信、结果传递和共享上下文层。现有 Hive 偏任务编排，不适合作为 profile 间通用通信层。
     5|     5|
     6|     6|## 2. Problem Statement
     7|     7|Hermes 不同 profile 缺少一个统一、可寻址、可审计、可通过 MCP 原生调用的通信基础设施，导致多 profile 协作只能依赖外部消息平台、人工 relay，或把任务板硬当成消息总线。
     8|     8|
     9|     9|## 3. Goals
    10|    10|- 提供 Hermes profile 间一对一/线程化通信能力。
    11|    11|- 提供 thread 级共享 scratchpad，支撑协作状态共享。
    12|    12|- 提供 MCP 工具，让 Hermes profile 能原生收件、发件、回复、确认消息。
    13|    13|- 保持实现简单，可作为 Hive 和未来 multi-agent orchestration 的基础模块。
    14|    14|
    15|    15|## 4. Non-Goals
    16|    16|- 不实现完整多 agent DAG 调度。
    17|    17|- 不实现 UI dashboard。
    18|    18|- 不实现外部 IM 平台桥接。
    19|    19|- 不做复杂权限模型（如 org/team/ACL matrix）。
    20|    20|
    21|    21|## 5. Users / Personas
    22|    22|- Hermes dispatcher/coordinator profile
    23|    23|- Hermes specialist worker profiles
    24|    24|- 管理员（admin），负责注册 profile 和发 token
    25|    25|
    26|    26|## 6. User Stories
    27|    27|- 作为 coordinator profile，我希望给另一个 worker profile 发 handoff 消息，这样可以在 Hermes 内完成交接。
    28|    28|- 作为 worker profile，我希望查看自己的 inbox 并对消息 read/ack，这样协作状态可追踪。
    29|    29|- 作为多个协作 profile，我希望在同一个 thread 里共享 scratchpad，这样可以积累上下文，而不是来回复制粘贴。
    30|    30|
    31|    31|## 7. Scope (In/Out)
    32|    32|### In
    33|    33|- Profile registry
    34|    34|- Auth
    35|    35|- Direct / group thread 数据模型
    36|    36|- Message send/read/ack
    37|    37|- Scratchpad
    38|    38|- MCP server + tools
    39|    39|- CLI（最小 admin/profile 操作）
    40|    40|
    41|    41|### Out
    42|    42|- DAG orchestration
    43|    43|- watchdog / recovery engine
    44|    44|- frontend
    45|    45|- gateway integration
    46|    46|
    47|    47|## 8. Functional Requirements
    48|    48|1. 系统必须允许 admin 登录并创建 profile。
    49|    49|2. 系统必须为新 profile 生成静态 access token，并仅在创建时返回一次。
    50|    50|3. profile 必须能够创建或复用 direct thread，并发送消息。
    51|    51|4. profile 必须只能访问自己参与的 thread、message、scratchpad。
    52|    52|5. 收件 profile 必须能查询 inbox，并把消息标记为 read 或 ack。
    53|    53|6. thread 必须支持 key-value scratchpad，并保留最后更新时间与操作者。
    54|    54|7. Hermes 必须可通过 MCP tools 调用上述核心能力。
    55|    55|
    56|    56|## 9. Acceptance Criteria
    57|    57|- Given admin 凭据正确, when 调用登录接口, then 返回 bearer token。
    58|    58|- Given admin token, when 创建 profile, then 返回 profile 信息与一次性 access token。
    59|    59|- Given alpha 和 beta 两个 profile, when alpha 发送 direct message 给 beta, then beta 的 inbox 返回该消息且状态为 unread。
    60|    60|- Given beta 收到 unread 消息, when beta 调用 read, then 该消息在 beta inbox 中状态变为 read。
    61|    61|- Given beta 已读消息, when beta 调用 ack, then 该消息状态变为 acked。
    62|    62|- Given alpha/beta 属于同一 thread, when alpha 设置 scratchpad key, then beta 查询该 thread scratchpad 时能看到相同值。
    63|    63|- Given MCP server 已启动, when 调用工具 dispatch, then 对应 client 方法被调用并返回结构化结果。
    64|    64|
    65|    65|## 10. Edge Cases / Failure Modes
    66|    66|- profile 向不存在的 recipient 发消息
    67|    67|- 非 thread 参与者读取 thread
    68|    68|- 重复创建 direct thread 时应复用已存在 thread
    69|    69|- ack/read 不属于自己的消息
    70|    70|- scratchpad key 覆盖更新
    71|    71|
    72|    72|## 11. Security / Privacy / Permission Notes
    73|    73|- 所有 API 除 login 外都需要 Bearer token。
    74|    74|- Admin JWT 可管理全部 profile。
    75|    75|- Profile token 只能访问与自身相关资源。
    76|    76|- 不在日志中泄露完整 access token。
    77|    77|
    78|    78|## 12. Rollout & Migration Notes
    79|    79|- 作为独立新项目交付，不影响现有 Hive。
    80|    80|- 后续可作为 Hive 或 Hermes multi-agent 扩展的依赖服务接入。
    81|    81|
    82|    82|## 13. Metrics / Success Signals
    83|    83|- 两个 profile 能完成完整消息往返。
    84|    84|- scratchpad 可共享。
    85|    85|- MCP 工具可稳定调用。
    86|    86|- 测试全部通过。
    87|    87|
    88|    88|## 14. Open Questions
    89|    89|- 后续是否需要把 thread/message 持久同步到 gateway 平台？
    90|    90|- 后续是否需要 workflow-level mailbox / queue 优先级？
    91|    91|", "total_lines": 90, "file_size": 4933, "truncated": false, "is_binary": false, "is_image": false}

{"content": "     1|     1|# hiveX Capability Contract
     2|     2|
     3|     3|## CAPABILITY
     4|     4|hiveX 为 Hermes profile 提供一个独立通信能力：profile 被注册为可寻址身份后，可以在受控 thread 中相互发送消息、做 handoff，并共享 thread 级 scratchpad，从而把 Hermes #344 里“多 agent 之间可沟通、可共享上下文”的基础设施先落地。
     5|     5|
     6|     6|## CONSTRAINTS
     7|     7|- 这是 communication plane，不承担 Hive 的 task orchestration 职责。
     8|     8|- Admin 与 profile 使用不同认证机制：admin JWT、profile 静态 token。
     9|     9|- Profile 只能访问自己参与的 thread / receipt / scratchpad。
    10|    10|- Direct thread 需要幂等复用，避免同一 pair 产生大量重复 thread。
    11|    11|- Scratchpad 需要结构化 JSON 值，而不是只支持字符串。
    12|    12|- MCP 工具必须映射到稳定的 REST client 方法，避免在 tool handler 中写业务逻辑。
    13|    13|
    14|    14|## IMPLEMENTATION CONTRACT
    15|    15|### actors
    16|    16|- admin
    17|    17|- sender profile
    18|    18|- recipient profile
    19|    19|
    20|    20|### surfaces
    21|    21|- FastAPI REST API
    22|    22|- Click CLI
    23|    23|- MCP server (stdio)
    24|    24|
    25|    25|### states and transitions
    26|    26|- receipt.status: unread -> read -> acked
    27|    27|- thread type: direct | group | handoff
    28|    28|- scratchpad key: create | update
    29|    29|
    30|    30|### interface/data implications
    31|    31|- `profiles` 存储身份与 token
    32|    32|- `threads` + `thread_participants` 存储通信域
    33|    33|- `messages` + `receipts` 存储消息及投递状态
    34|    34|- `scratchpad_entries` 存储线程共享状态
    35|    35|
    36|    36|## NON-GOALS
    37|    37|- coordinator routing
    38|    38|- workflow DAG execution
    39|    39|- health monitoring / retry orchestration
    40|    40|- gateway fan-out
    41|    41|
    42|    42|## OPEN QUESTIONS
    43|    43|- 后续是否需要 message priority / SLA / retry policy
    44|    44|- 是否要把 scratchpad 提升为 workflow-scoped object，而不是 thread-scoped
    45|    45|
    46|    46|## HANDOFF
    47|    47|已具备进入技术设计与 TDD 实现的条件。下一步：按 FastAPI + SQLite + MCP 的最小实现落地，并用 pytest 覆盖关键行为。
    48|    48|", "total_lines": 47, "file_size": 2149, "truncated": false, "is_binary": false, "is_image": false}

{"content": "     1|     1|# hiveX Technical Design
     2|     2|
     3|     3|- design_owner: architect
     4|     4|- review_dependencies: [planner]
     5|     5|- status: PASS
     6|     6|
     7|     7|## Overview
     8|     8|hiveX 采用与 Hive 类似的 FastAPI + SQLite + MCP 结构，但职责收敛为“通信基础设施”：提供 profile registry、threaded messaging、receipt 状态流转、thread scratchpad、以及 Hermes MCP 原生接入。
     9|     9|
    10|    10|## Architecture
    11|    11|
    12|    12|```text
    13|    13|Hermes Profile
    14|    14|   │
    15|    15|   │ MCP (stdio)
    16|    16|   ▼
    17|    17|hiveX MCP Server
    18|    18|   │
    19|    19|   │ HTTP
    20|    20|   ▼
    21|    21|hiveX FastAPI Server
    22|    22|   │
    23|    23|   ▼
    24|    24|SQLite
    25|    25|  - profiles
    26|    26|  - threads
    27|    27|  - thread_participants
    28|    28|  - messages
    29|    29|  - receipts
    30|    30|  - scratchpad_entries
    31|    31|```
    32|    32|
    33|    33|### Why this shape
    34|    34|- 复用 Hive 已验证过的 FastAPI + SQLite + MCP 结构，降低实现风险。
    35|    35|- 与 Hermes issue #344 对齐：先做通信与共享上下文层，而不是一下做 coordinator + workflow engine。
    36|    36|- direct thread + receipt + scratchpad 足够支撑 result passing / shared scratchpad 两种协作模式。
    37|    37|
    38|    38|## Interface/API Contracts
    39|    39|- `POST /api/auth/login` -> admin JWT
    40|    40|- `GET /api/auth/me` -> 当前身份
    41|    41|- `POST /api/profiles` -> admin 创建 profile，返回 access token（一次）
    42|    42|- `GET /api/profiles` -> profile 目录
    43|    43|- `POST /api/threads/direct` -> 创建/复用 direct thread
    44|    44|- `GET /api/threads` -> 当前 profile 的 thread 列表
    45|    45|- `GET /api/threads/{thread_id}` -> thread 详情
    46|    46|- `GET /api/threads/{thread_id}/messages` -> thread message stream
    47|    47|- `POST /api/threads/{thread_id}/messages` -> thread 发消息
    48|    48|- `GET /api/messages/inbox` -> 当前 profile inbox
    49|    49|- `POST /api/messages/{message_id}/read` -> 标记已读
    50|    50|- `POST /api/messages/{message_id}/ack` -> 标记确认，可附带 note
    51|    51|- `GET /api/threads/{thread_id}/scratchpad` -> 获取 scratchpad
    52|    52|- `PUT /api/threads/{thread_id}/scratchpad/{key}` -> upsert scratchpad value
    53|    53|
    54|    54|## Data Model Implications
    55|    55|### profiles
    56|    56|- `profile_id`
    57|    57|- `display_name`
    58|    58|- `capabilities` JSON
    59|    59|- `access_token`
    60|    60|- timestamps
    61|    61|
    62|    62|### threads
    63|    63|- `thread_id`
    64|    64|- `thread_type`
    65|    65|- `subject`
    66|    66|- `created_by`
    67|    67|- `metadata` JSON
    68|    68|
    69|    69|### thread_participants
    70|    70|- `thread_id`
    71|    71|- `profile_id`
    72|    72|
    73|    73|### messages
    74|    74|- `message_id`
    75|    75|- `thread_id`
    76|    76|- `sender_id`
    77|    77|- `body`
    78|    78|- `message_type`
    79|    79|- `reply_to_message_id`
    80|    80|- `metadata` JSON
    81|    81|
    82|    82|### receipts
    83|    83|- `message_id`
    84|    84|- `profile_id`
    85|    85|- `status`
    86|    86|- `read_at`
    87|    87|- `acked_at`
    88|    88|
    89|    89|### scratchpad_entries
    90|    90|- `thread_id`
    91|    91|- `key`
    92|    92|- `value` JSON
    93|    93|- `updated_by`
    94|    94|- `updated_at`
    95|    95|
    96|    96|## Security Considerations
    97|    97|- 所有非 login 接口均要求 Bearer token。
    98|    98|- Admin 拥有全局权限。
    99|    99|- Profile 必须校验 thread participation。
   100|   100|- 不返回完整 token 给非创建场景。
   101|   101|- ack/read 只能作用于当前 profile 的 receipt。
   102|   102|
   103|   103|## Test Strategy
   104|   104|- integration: auth/profile 注册、message flow、scratchpad
   105|   105|- unit: MCP tool dispatch
   106|   106|- access control: 非参与者读取 thread/message/scratchpad 应失败
   107|   107|
   108|   108|## Rollout/Rollback
   109|   109|- 独立项目，无现网迁移。
   110|   110|- rollback = 停止服务并保留 sqlite 文件即可。
   111|   111|
   112|   112|## Risks
   113|   113|- SQLite 单机模型不适合高并发，但适合 MVP。
   114|   114|- direct thread reuse 查询若实现草率，容易产生重复 thread。
   115|   115|- ack 时附带 note 会引入“副作用消息”，需要清晰建模。
   116|   116|", "total_lines": 115, "file_size": 3932, "truncated": false, "is_binary": false, "is_image": false}

我直接补代码和测试，不只改文档。新增：
- reply_to_message_id 必须属于同一 thread
- inbox / thread messages 的 limit 下界校验
- profile token 增加 `revoked_at`
- 启动时强制要求显式配置 admin 密码和 JWT secret，不再使用弱默认值
- 新增对应测试 ♪
